title: strLength assertion on join and concat
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE b (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO a (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), (NULL, 25);
SELECT a.name, '{ "user":"' || a.name || '", "age":' || COALESCE(a.age, 'NULL') || ' }' as json FROM a JOIN b ON a.age = b.id;
key_bug_features: strLength assertion on join and concat
